descriptionZh: 每当你给予[gold]易伤[/gold]时，抽{Cards:diff()}张牌。

descriptionEn: Whenever you draw this card, lose {Energy:energyIcons()}.
descriptionZh: 每当你抽到这张牌时，失去{Energy:energyIcons()}。

descriptionEn:
End your turn.
The first {VoidFormPower:plural:card|{VoidFormPower:diff()} cards} you play each turn {VoidFormPower:plural:is|are} free to play.
descriptionZh:
结束你的回合。
你可以免费打出每回合的前{VoidFormPower:diff()}张牌。

descriptionEn: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy X times.
descriptionZh: 随机对敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害X次。

descriptionEn:
[gold]Channel Lightning[/gold] equal to the [gold]Lightning[/gold] already [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat.{InCombat:
([gold]Channel[/gold] {CalculatedChannels:diff()} [gold]Lightning[/gold])|}
descriptionZh:
[gold]生成[/gold]等量于你在这场战斗中[gold]生成过[/gold]的[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球数量的[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球。{InCombat:
（[gold]生成[/gold]{CalculatedChannels:diff()}个[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球）|}

descriptionEn: Gain {WasteAwayPower:diff()} less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} per turn.
descriptionZh: 每回合失去{WasteAwayPower:diff()}点{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。

descriptionEn: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to {RetainAmount:diff()} {RetainAmount:plural:card|cards}.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合结束时，[gold]保留[/gold]最多{RetainAmount:diff()}张牌。

descriptionEn: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
descriptionZh: 对所有敌人造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害X次。

descriptionEn:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Stun[/gold] the enemy.
descriptionZh:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
[gold]击晕[/gold]该敌人。

descriptionEn: Add a random Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
descriptionZh: 将一张随机能力牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合内免费打出。

descriptionEn: Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
descriptionZh: 将你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的一张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。

descriptionEn: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
descriptionZh: 获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。

descriptionEn:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the start of your turn, lose {WraithFormPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
descriptionZh:
获得{IntangiblePower:diff()}[gold]无实体[/gold]。
在你的回合开始时，失去{WraithFormPower:diff()}点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。

descriptionEn:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
descriptionZh:
造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害。
[gold]铸造[/gold]{Forge:diff()}。

descriptionEn: [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold].
descriptionZh: [gold]生成[/gold]1个[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球。
